politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This privacy notice sets out how Moodle collects and uses information about you when you use our products and services ("services") and why we collect certain personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Moodle Pty Ltd and its affiliated companies ("Moodle", "we" or "us")

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
Our independent Data Protection Officer is:

Data Compliance Europe Ltd.
12 City Gate
Lower Bridge Street, Dublin 8
Ireland

Email: dpo@moodle.com

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ‘Personal data’, in this privacy notice, means any information that relates to an identified or identifiable natural person, such as a name, an identification number, location data, or online identifiers (including cookies).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
Our legal bases for controlling or processing personal data are:

- **Article 6.1(a) GDPR (Consent):**You provide informed consent to us or have a reasonable expectation that we will use your information in a certain way – for example, to engage in our community discussions, or to hear about new services or offers.
- **Article 6.1(b) GDPR (Contract):**Providing our services and fulfilling our obligations to you, usually relating to a terms of service or partnership agreement;
- **Article 6.1(c) GDPR (Legal Obligation):**The necessity to meet compliance with our legal obligations; and/or
- **Article 6.1(f) GDPR (Legitimate Interest):**Where it is in our legitimate interests to do so.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Where we rely on a specific basis for processing your information and you wish to object to that processing, you must be aware that it might not be possible for you to continue using our services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy notice or as required by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may need to pass your personal data on to third-party service providers contracted to Moodle in the course of dealing with you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We maintain physical, organisational and technical safeguards for all personal data we hold.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés
Distinction fonctionnels / publicitaires
cookies.quote: Our public marketing sites (e.g., moodle.com and moodleacademy.com) may use behavioral signals and personalisation features from Google Analytics to support commercial activities. Crucially, these advertising and remarketing features are explicitly disabled and are not enabled within the core Moodle LMS product

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: Our public marketing sites (e.g., moodle.com and moodleacademy.com) may use behavioral signals and personalisation features from Google Analytics to support commercial activities.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Cross Border Standard Contract Clauses (SCCs) that will allow us to contract with you to ensure protection of any personal data required to be transferred outside the EEA.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: such as a name, an identification number, location data, or online identifiers (including cookies). An identifiable natural person is someone who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number
identite.purpose: Identification des utilisateurs pour la création de comptes et la fourniture de services.

contact.quote: when you: create an individual or corporate user account; request support; register for or participate in an online class, exam, certification, training, webcast or other event; request information or materials; participate in surveys or evaluations; participate in promotions, contests or giveaways; make a purchase through our shop or register products; apply for employment; submit questions or comments
contact.purpose: Communication avec les utilisateurs pour le support, les inscriptions, les achats et autres interactions.

compte_auth.quote: create an individual or corporate user account; providing login systems to users via their existing social media accounts
compte_auth.purpose: Gestion des comptes utilisateurs et authentification via des identifiants ou des comptes sociaux.

paiement.quote: make a purchase through our shop or register products
paiement.purpose: Traitement des transactions financières pour les achats ou enregistrements de produits.

localisation.quote: such as a name, an identification number, location data, or online identifiers (including cookies)
localisation.purpose: Collecte de données de localisation pour l'identification ou la personnalisation des services.

appareil_technique.purpose: Collecte d'informations techniques (IP, cookies) pour le fonctionnement et l'analyse.

usage_comportement.quote: Our public marketing sites (e.g., moodle.com and moodleacademy.com) may use behavioral signals and personalisation features from Google Analytics to support commercial activities
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse du comportement des utilisateurs sur les sites publics pour des activités commerciales.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: submit content or posts on our forums or other interactive webpages; any special categories of special personal data which any user volunteers while using our services (for example in a forum or submission)
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Collecte des contenus créés par les utilisateurs (forums, soumissions).

communications.quote: participate in promotions, contests or giveaways; submit questions or comments
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications (questions, commentaires, participations à des événements).

donnees_tiers.quote: We do not share with, or receive personal information from, third parties unless it is necessary for the provision of our services and is carried out in accordance with applicable Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) and data protection laws
donnees_tiers.purpose: Réception de données personnelles via des tiers pour la fourniture de services.

biometrie.quote: biometric data in the form of facial images, where you have uploaded and we store your profile picture
biometrie.purpose: Stockage d'images faciales (photos de profil) comme données biométriques.

donnees_sensibles.quote: health data in respect of employees, contractors and other people who work with us; any special categories of special personal data which any user volunteers while using our services (for example in a forum or submission)
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Collecte de données sensibles (santé, opinions) pour les employés ou via les contributions des utilisateurs.

mineurs.purpose: Protection des données des mineurs, mais pas de collecte directe indiquée.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur, communications
legal_bases.quote: **Article 6.1(a) GDPR (Consent):**You provide informed consent to us or have a reasonable expectation that we will use your information in a certain way – for example, to engage in our community discussions, or to hear about new services or offers
**Article 6.1(b) GDPR (Contract):**Providing our services and fulfilling our obligations to you, usually relating to a terms of service or partnership agreement
**Article 6.1(c) GDPR (Legal Obligation):**The necessity to meet compliance with our legal obligations

**Article 6.1(f) GDPR (Legitimate Interest):**Where it is in our legitimate interests to do so. We only rely on ‘legitimate interests’ as the legal basis for processing by us, or third parties we use, for these purposes:- recruitment and induction of new employees, contractors and other people who work with us, - emergency contacts for people who work with us, such as employees and contractors for health and safety purposes, - business development; or - providing login systems to users via their existing social media accounts

transfers.quote: Cross Border Standard Contract Clauses (SCCs) that will allow us to contract with you to ensure protection of any personal data required to be transferred outside the EEA; Our independent Data Protection Officer is: Data Compliance Europe Ltd. 12 City Gate Lower Bridge Street, Dublin 8 Ireland; Moodle Pty Ltd PO Box 303 West Perth WA 6872 Australia
